'''jabuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niacin|niacin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niacin|niacin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jabuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbithith|jæbithith]] || [[word:jæbithij|jæbithij]] || [[word:jæbithish|jæbithish]] || [[word:jæbithi|jæbithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabubuthuth|jabubuthuth]] || [[word:jabubuthuj|jabubuthuj]] || [[word:jabubuthush|jabubuthush]] || [[word:jabubuthu|jabubuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabuthuth|jabuthuth]] || [[word:jabuthuj|jabuthuj]] || [[word:jabuthush|jabuthush]] || [[word:jabuthu|jabuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabufthuth|jabufthuth]] || [[word:jabufthuj|jabufthuj]] || [[word:jabufthush|jabufthush]] || [[word:jabufthuf|jabufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabuthuthu|jabuthuthu]] || [[word:jabuthuju|jabuthuju]] || [[word:jabuthushu|jabuthushu]] || [[word:jabuthuku|jabuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabuthuth|jabuthuth]] || [[word:jabuthuj|jabuthuj]] || [[word:jabuthush|jabuthush]] || [[word:jabuthu|jabuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabuthuthul|jabuthuthul]] || [[word:jabuthujul|jabuthujul]] || [[word:jabuthushul|jabuthushul]] || [[word:jabuthukul|jabuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabuthuthuthu|jabuthuthuthu]] || [[word:jabuthujuju|jabuthujuju]] || [[word:jabuthushushu|jabuthushushu]] || [[word:jabuthuku|jabuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabuthuthun|jabuthuthun]] || [[word:jabuthujun|jabuthujun]] || [[word:jabuthushun|jabuthushun]] || [[word:jabuthukun|jabuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabuthuthuoro|jabuthuthuoro]] || [[word:jabuthujuoro|jabuthujuoro]] || [[word:jabuthushuoro|jabuthushuoro]] || [[word:jabuthukuoro|jabuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
